subject: [RFC PATCH 4/9 v2] mm/memcontrol: charge/uncharge toptier memory to mem_cgroup

2026-04-23.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new page_counter called 'toptier' to mem_cgroup, which accounts for the usage of top-tier memory in parallel with existing memory accounting mechanisms. The goal is to capture the asymmetric utility of top-tier memory from lower-tier memory. Currently, this model only works on LRU folios and does not include enforcement mechanisms. Future patches will address other sites where top-tier memory should be accounted for.
